## StoryVocab Issue

Please choose a bug report or feature request template when possible.

Useful details:

- what you were trying to do;
- browser and operating system;
- whether you used local `file://`, a local server, or GitHub Pages;
- screenshots or short recordings for UI issues;
- a small example for wordbook, story, review, or connector problems.

Do not include API keys, passwords, private endpoints, or private learning data.

For collaboration, educational use, internships/jobs, referrals, or professional introductions, see [SUPPORT.md](../SUPPORT.md) or contact dsong25@gmu.edu.
